title: Deadly_SMP_Plugin season 2 and season 1
description:
This plugin was created by Deadly_Man_YT.

- Adds powerful custom weapons with unique left/right-click abilities and cooldowns.

- Introduces full-set custom armor with permanent effects and special activations (e.g., Infinite Totem via double crouch).
body:
Deadly SMP is a high power custom Minecraft plugin built for intense PvE combat, god tier weapons, unique armor mechanics, and fully scripted boss fights.
Designed for Minecraft 1.21+ (Paper/Spigot), this plugin transforms survival into a brutal endgame experience.

Custom Weapons

Storm Essence Trident

- Right Click
  Summons 20 lightning strikes over 30 seconds in a 30 block radius
  Cooldown starts after the effect ends
  
- Left Click
  Precision lightning strike on the aimed target
  Applies strong debuffs

Giga Chad God Sword

- Right Click
  Continuous focus beam on the aimed target
  Damage over time with debuffs

- Left Click
 Thunder aura striking multiple nearby enemies
 Heavy debuffs

- Passive
  Punishing strikes trigger thunder punishment and additional debuffs

Additional weapons include frost themed and aquatic tools focused on crowd control and movement abilities.

Armor Sets

Omni Chestplate:
- Needs to be charged by sun or endrods or giga chad essence
- crouch jump jump jump: can open a gui showing player distnace and you relase a dog on them
- Jump crouch jump crouch jump: can open anti domain which can kill any player near its radius
- right click  empty hand: can make a force field 
- if you get hit 100 times you will shot a laser beam on a person
- double crouch enables inf totem of undying for 5 mins
- crouch 4 time you can summon the chad stallion the fastest horse ever


Ascendant Set
  
  Permanent full set effects while worn:
 
  Night Vision
 
  Fire Resistance
  Stack safe with other sets
 
Dragon Scale Flight
  
  Double jump glide mechanic
  
  Short flight bursts
  
  Does not interfere with mace usage
  
  Effect Handling
  
  Effects apply only when the full set is worn
  
  Effects are removed immediately if any piece is missing
  
  Clean and persistent with no stacking bugs
  
Bosses

Apex Boss
- Giga Chad God
  Highest health
  Player summon only
  Excluded from auto spawn

Overworld Bosses

- Warden of Souls
  
- Drowned Knight
  
- Frost Warden
  
- Storm Caller
  
Nether Bosses

- Inferno Lord
  
- Dark Legionary
  
- Boss Ability Highlights
  
Storm Caller
- Chain lightning that jumps between nearby players

Frost Warden
- Ice spike barrage causing area damage and slows

Dark Legionary
- Shadow dash, minion summons, AoE shadow shout with Wither

Drowned Knight
- Drowning grasp pull and slow
  High defense and aggressive attacks

Boss stats are fully configurable and tuned for high difficulty.

/deadlysmp → Main command menu

/giveweapon <player> <weapon>

/givearmor <player> <armorpiece>

/summonboss <bossname>

/forge → View Deadly Forge recipes

/craftforge → Open 3x3 Craft Forge

/giveallbossdrops

/giveall bosses <bossId>

Balance & Improvements

Stronger boss stats with faster ability cycles

Storm Essence Trident fully reworked

Giga Chad God Sword buffs and stronger debuffs

Legion Commander cooldown adjusted

Inferno Core Blade fixed to trigger once per click

Voidwalker teleport damage reliability improved

Armor effects cleaned and made permanent

Full mace compatibility ensured

Boss HP and coordinate broadcasts added

Idle despawn prevents unattended lag


if you have any question pls check the Deadly smp discord


Big update on December
- texture pack
- better optimized
